mapper.select:
select r.review_id, r.homestay_id, r.score, r.content, r.user_id, r.create_time, r.reply_content, r.reply_time, h.title, h.user_id as homestayUserId, u.user_name, u.avatar from review r left join homestay h on r.homestay_id = h.homestay_id left join user u on r.user_id = u.user_id
and r.homestay_id = #{homestayId} and r.user_id = #{userId} and h.user_id = #{homestayUserId}
and h.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
and u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
order by r.create_time desc

select r.review_id, r.homestay_id, r.score, r.content, r.user_id, r.create_time, r.reply_content, r.reply_time, h.title, u.user_name from review r left join homestay h on r.homestay_id = h.homestay_id left join user u on r.user_id = u.user_id where r.user_id = #{userId} and r.reply_content is not null and r.reply_read_state = 0 order by r.reply_time desc
mapper.update: update review set reply_read_state = 1 where user_id = #{userId} and reply_read_state = 0
mapper.select: select review_id, homestay_id, score, content, user_id, create_time, reply_content, reply_time from review where review_id = #{reviewId}

select r.review_id, r.homestay_id, r.score, r.content, r.user_id, r.create_time, r.reply_content, r.reply_time, h.title, h.user_id as homestayUserId, u.user_name, u.avatar from review r left join homestay h on r.homestay_id = h.homestay_id left join user u on r.user_id = u.user_id where r.homestay_id = #{homestayId} order by r.create_time desc
mapper.insert:
insert into review
review_id, homestay_id, score, content, user_id, create_time,
#{reviewId}, #{homestayId}, #{score}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{createTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from review where review_id in
#{reviewId}
